Homebrew Formulae

percona-xtrabackup

Install command:

Also known as: percona-xtrabackup@8.4

Open source hot backup tool for InnoDB and XtraDB databases

https://www.percona.com/software/mysql-database/percona-xtrabackup

License: GPL-2.0-only

Development: Pull requests

Formula JSON API: /api/formula/percona-xtrabackup.json

Formula code: percona-xtrabackup.rb on GitHub

Bottle (binary package) installation support provided for:

macOS on
Apple Silicon		 tahoe ✅
sequoia ✅
sonoma ✅
macOS on
Intel		 sonoma ✅
Linux ARM64 ✅
x86_64 ✅

Current versions:

stable ✅ 8.4.0-5

Other versions:

percona-xtrabackup@8.0 8.0.35-35 Open source hot backup tool for InnoDB and XtraDB databases

Revision: 6

Depends on:

icu4c@78 78.3 C/C++ and Java libraries for Unicode and globalization
libev 4.33 Asynchronous event library
libgcrypt 1.12.2 Cryptographic library based on the code from GnuPG
lz4 1.10.0 Extremely Fast Compression algorithm
openssl@3 3.6.2 Cryptography and SSL/TLS Toolkit
protobuf 35.1 Protocol buffers (Google's data interchange format)
zlib-ng-compat 2.3.3 Zlib replacement with optimizations for next generation systems
zstd 1.5.7 Zstandard is a real-time compression algorithm

Depends on when building from source:

bison 3.8.2 Parser generator
cmake 4.3.4 Cross-platform make
pkgconf 2.5.1 Package compiler and linker metadata toolkit
sphinx-doc 9.1.0 Tool to create intelligent and beautiful documentation
